# Vendored browser libraries

These files are bundled with the unpacked extension so capture works offline and does not execute
remote code:

- `readability.js`: [Mozilla Readability](https://github.com/mozilla/readability), version 0.6.0,
  Apache-2.0.
- `turndown.js`: [Turndown](https://github.com/mixmark-io/turndown), version 7.2.4, MIT.
- `turndown-plugin-gfm.js`: [Turndown GFM plugin](https://github.com/mixmark-io/turndown-plugin-gfm),
  version 1.0.2, MIT.

The corresponding license texts are in `licenses/`.
